candidate_decisions.decision_rule: advance when a candidate does not clear every pre-registered rung; do not rewrite the bar
candidate_decisions.missing_required_rung: comparable activation-transcriptome or activation-marker primary T-cell screen
candidate_decisions.why_not_contradicted: the frozen comparators do not refute PGGT1B; they fail to supply the required comparable replication rung

candidate_decisions.decision_rule: advance when a candidate does not clear every pre-registered rung; do not rewrite the bar
candidate_decisions.missing_required_rung: independent primary T-cell support, real-world hook, and specific activation mechanism
candidate_decisions.why_not_contradicted: the frozen comparators do not refute RCC1L; they show the candidate lacks required independent support and hook

candidate_decisions.decision_rule: advance when a candidate does not clear every pre-registered rung; do not rewrite the bar
candidate_decisions.missing_required_rung: independent primary T-cell support, real-world hook, and specific activation mechanism
candidate_decisions.why_not_contradicted: the frozen comparators do not refute MCAT; they show the candidate lacks required independent support and hook

candidate_decisions.decision_rule: advance when a candidate does not clear every pre-registered rung; do not rewrite the bar
candidate_decisions.missing_required_rung: independent primary T-cell support, real-world hook, specific activation mechanism, and non-activation artifact kill
candidate_decisions.why_not_contradicted: the frozen comparators do not refute RWDD2B; they show the candidate lacks required independent support and mechanism

honest_ceiling: computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth
next_step: human review of the held candidate, then optional human-key acceptance
title: Defended candidate decision ledger
